<!-- What deployment concern does this change measure or improve? -->

## What this changes

## Type
- [ ] New / edited scenario(s)
- [ ] Harness / scoring change
- [ ] World or taxonomy change
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] `python -m pytest` is green (offline)
- [ ] `fiduciary validate` prints `OK`
- [ ] If `data/world/` changed, the sha256 manifest was regenerated and committed
- [ ] New behavior has a test
